name: SAPS
description: Handles criminal activity, investigations, arrests, and public safety enforcement.

name: Metro Police
description: Enforces traffic laws and municipal by-laws including illegal parking and disturbances.

name: Municipal Operations
description: Coordinates municipal services and handles escalations across departments.

name: Water and Sanitation
description: Responsible for water supply, sewer systems, and sanitation infrastructure.

name: Electricity
description: Manages power supply, outages, and electrical infrastructure.

name: Roads and Stormwater
description: Maintains roads, stormwater drainage, and traffic infrastructure.

name: Waste Management
description: Handles waste collection, illegal dumping, and sanitation services.

name: Parks and Recreation
description: Maintains parks, recreational spaces, and public facilities.

name: Human Settlements
description: Responsible for housing development and informal settlements.

name: Public Safety
description: Coordinates general safety initiatives and community protection programs.

name: Fire and Emergency Services
description: Handles fires, rescue operations, and emergency response services.

name: Traffic and Transport
description: Manages traffic systems, road flow, and transport services.

name: Environmental Health
description: Monitors public health, pollution, and environmental safety.

name: Building Control
description: Oversees construction compliance and building regulations.

name: Sewer and Drainage
description: Handles sewer blockages and drainage systems.

name: Street Lighting
description: Maintains street lights and public lighting infrastructure.

name: Customer Support / Call Centre
description: Handles citizen queries and service requests.

name: Disaster Management
description: Coordinates disaster response such as floods and storms.

name: Cemeteries and Crematoria
description: Manages burial services and cemetery operations.

name: Fleet and Mechanical Services
description: Maintains municipal vehicles and operational equipment.

name: Community Services
description: Provides social development and community programs.

name: Facilities Maintenance
description: Maintains municipal buildings and infrastructure.
